description: Student-led protests in Taiwan during March and April 2014, occupying the Legislative Yuan to protest the Cross-Strait Service Trade Agreement. Public opinion shifted significantly as concerns about mainland China's influence grew.

key_events.description: Legislative Yuan is occupied by protesters following a procedural dispute.
Massive peaceful rally of 500,000 protesters outside the Presidential Office Building.
Legislative Speaker Wang Jin-pyng pledges not to conduct further negotiations until a review mechanism is established.
Protesters vacate the Legislative Yuan after government concessions.

calibration_notes: Example of a high-stakes geopolitical protest where moderate public sentiment shifts rapidly toward the protest movement.
